name: STARZ ENTERTAINMENT CORP /CN/
summary: PART I . Separation Prior to the Separation, as defined and further discussed below, Starz Entertainment Corp. (the Starz Business) substantially consisted of Lions Gate Entertainment Corp's (Old Lionsgate or Parent) Media Networks segment consisting of (i) Starz Networks, which includes the domestic distribution of STARZ branded premium subscription video services through over-the-top (OTT) streaming platforms and distributors, on a direct-to-consumer basis through the Starz App and through who...
